name: Carlyle Secured Lending Inc. 8.20% Notes due 2028
summary: Carlyle Secured Lending Inc. is a specialty finance company focused on providing financing to middle-market companies. The company originates and invests in first-lien senior secured loans and unitranche loans. Carlyle Secured Lending is managed by an affiliate of The Carlyle Group and is headquartered in New York, New York.
